channel.title: I want to convert by html site https://old.mbits.io/ to frontity with same design to achive this deisin is posible
channel.description:
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->[my site](https://old.mbits.io/)

item.title: I want to convert by html site https://old.mbits.io/ to frontity with same design to achive this deisin is posible
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
HI @techiegram836 ,

You can create a custom design to emulate the one you have in old.mbits.io with Frontity by applying custom styles to your React App.

Frontity can help you to connect your site with the data stored in your WordPress installation (posts, pages…)

Read full topic
item.source: I want to convert by html site https://old.mbits.io/ to frontity with same design to achive this deisin is posible

item.title: I want to convert by html site https://old.mbits.io/ to frontity with same design to achive this deisin is posible
item.dc:creator: techiegram836
item.description:
I just wanted to know my website old.mbits.io in html right now, is firstly i have to convert this in wordpress with same actual styling ? or to put only content in wordpress ? please guide me i am new to frontity…

Read full topic
item.source: I want to convert by html site https://old.mbits.io/ to frontity with same design to achive this deisin is posible

item.title: I want to convert by html site https://old.mbits.io/ to frontity with same design to achive this deisin is posible
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @techiegram836,

Can you provide more info about your issue?
Frontity allows you to use React as the engine to create the Frontend of a WordPress site.
There’s no automatic way (as far as we know) to automatically convert a WordPress theme into a React project, so I’m afraid this has to be done manually.
The advantage of doing this is that once is done, the maintenance and evolution of site will be easier to manage

Read full topic
item.source: I want to convert by html site https://old.mbits.io/ to frontity with same design to achive this deisin is posible
